name: savePreparedInlineMessage
description: Stores a message that can be sent by a user of a Mini App

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the target user that can use the prepared message

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: A JSON-serialized object describing the message to be sent

parameters.name: allow_user_chats
parameters.description: Pass True if the message can be sent to private chats with users

parameters.name: allow_bot_chats
parameters.description: Pass True if the message can be sent to private chats with bots

parameters.name: allow_group_chats
parameters.description: Pass True if the message can be sent to group and supergroup chats

parameters.name: allow_channel_chats
parameters.description: Pass True if the message can be sent to channel chats
